title: masdevallia schroederiana
intro: Masdevallia schroederiana, also known as the Schroeder's masdevallia, is a type of orchid native to South America. This epiphytic orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Masdevallia schroederiana include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Masdevallia schroederiana is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and ointments.
